title: BetterMiniStructures
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/352216086e2de741f3ca0635c54d272264f4e652.png)

Upgrade your world with: Better Mini Structures. This mod adds cool, new and varied mini structures to give your world a more lively look.


## 🛠️ Features:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### **Structures:**

**Desert:**
1. Desert-Grave
2. Mini-Desert-Monument
3. Mini-Desert-Pyramid

**Swamp:**
1. Witch-Altar
2. Pillager Swamp Camp 1/2
3. Swamp Ruin 1/2/3/4

**Forest:**
1. Mossy Ruin 1/2

**Plains:**
1. Wandering Trader Wagon

</details>

## 🎨 Style:
The structures are vanilla like and come with features that are already ingame.


## 🎉 Future Updates:
We're constantly working on adding more structures to the mod. Stay tuned for future updates.
